Eudiw._RequestObjectSigning-source: ADR-0011. PrivateKeyPem source: user-secrets ('dotnet user-secrets set Eudiw:RequestObjectSigning:PrivateKeyPem "<PEM>"'), env var Eudiw__RequestObjectSigning__PrivateKeyPem, or publish/api/appsettings.json patch (start-all.ps1). Do NOT add 'RequestObjectSigning': { 'PrivateKeyPem': '' } here — an empty string in Development OVERRIDES the populated base appsettings.json and breaks the wallet (request-object endpoint returns 503).

Jwt._signing-key-source: Signing:Key source: user-secrets ('dotnet user-secrets set Jwt:Signing:Key <32+ chars>'), env var Jwt__Signing__Key, or publish/api/appsettings.json patch (start-all.ps1). Do NOT add 'Signing': { 'Key': '' } here — an empty string in Development OVERRIDES the populated base appsettings.json and disables JWT bearer auth.
